title: Coordinate horticultural crop harvesting
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Coordinate horticultural crop harvesting demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for crop harvesting

pcs.text: Confirm crop to be harvested and the requirements and procedures to assure crop quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm crop to be harvested and the requirements and procedures to assure crop quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm crop to be harvested and the requirements and procedures to assure crop quality.

pcs.text: Determine crop maturity utilising specification charts, aids or devices and according to client, workplace and industry quality assurance specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine crop maturity utilising specification charts, aids or devices and according to client, workplace and industry quality assurance specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine crop maturity utilising specification charts, aids or devices and according to client, workplace and industry quality assurance specifications.

pcs.text: Identify suitable weather conditions for picking according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify suitable weather conditions for picking according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify suitable weather conditions for picking according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Select required tools, equipment and machinery according to harvest requirements, and check for safe operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select required tools, equipment and machinery according to harvest requirements, and check for safe operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select required tools, equipment and machinery according to harvest requirements, and check for safe operation.

pcs.text: Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with crop harvesting, and minimise impact
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with crop harvesting, and minimise impact?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify environmental and biosecurity implications associated with crop harvesting, and minimise impact.

pcs.text: Select, fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit and use personal protective equipment applicable to the task.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for crop harvesting

elements.title: Coordinate harvesting activities

pcs.text: Inform seasonal labour of the harvest plan and strategy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inform seasonal labour of the harvest plan and strategy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inform seasonal labour of the harvest plan and strategy.

pcs.text: Assign daily work tasks to harvest staff
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assign daily work tasks to harvest staff?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assign daily work tasks to harvest staff.

pcs.text: Confirm work program allows for contingencies caused by weather or other interruptions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm work program allows for contingencies caused by weather or other interruptions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm work program allows for contingencies caused by weather or other interruptions.

pcs.text: Monitor the harvest and coordinate changes to work activities where required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor the harvest and coordinate changes to work activities where required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor the harvest and coordinate changes to work activities where required.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Coordinate harvesting activities

elements.title: Monitor crop quality throughout harvest

pcs.text: Confirm harvesting procedures and the harvested crop comply with specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm harvesting procedures and the harvested crop comply with specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm harvesting procedures and the harvested crop comply with specifications.

pcs.text: Confirm crop is handled in a way that minimises damage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm crop is handled in a way that minimises damage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm crop is handled in a way that minimises damage.

pcs.text: Confirm crop sorting and grading complies with specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm crop sorting and grading complies with specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm crop sorting and grading complies with specifications.

pcs.text: Minimise post-harvest deterioration in crop storage according to enterprise work procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Minimise post-harvest deterioration in crop storage according to enterprise work procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Minimise post-harvest deterioration in crop storage according to enterprise work procedures.

pcs.text: Transport the crop with minimum damage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transport the crop with minimum damage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transport the crop with minimum damage.

pcs.text: Calculate and record picking tallies or harvest yields
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate and record picking tallies or harvest yields?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate and record picking tallies or harvest yields.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Monitor crop quality throughout harvest

elements.title: Deliver crop to specified destination

pcs.text: Deliver crop with damage levels that are within specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Deliver crop with damage levels that are within specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Deliver crop with damage levels that are within specifications.

pcs.text: Confirm crop complies with client, workplace and industry quality assurance specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm crop complies with client, workplace and industry quality assurance specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm crop complies with client, workplace and industry quality assurance specifications.

pcs.text: Complete delivery documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete delivery documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete delivery documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Deliver crop to specified destination
